what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links a design-source channel item to an image asset identified by image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-14.
observations: YAML frontmatter only; no body content
standouts: Uses an image:// URI scheme to reference the asset
Ties the attachment to the design-source channel
conventions: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
Attachment target expressed as a URI
File naming pattern att-<uuid>.md for attachment records
concerns: The referenced image asset is not present in the file; only a URI pointer is provided
No checksum, size, or media-type metadata is included
notes: A minimal metadata stub that points a design-source channel attachment to an image asset at p-14.
questions: What is the actual content of image p-14?
Who added this attachment and why?
How is the image:// URI resolved to a concrete file?
What pitch or message does p-14 belong to?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file is an attachment metadata record and it records an image attachment pointer.
intention_signals: Capture and preserve the association between a design-source channel item and an image asset so it can be retrieved or linked later.
novelty: The image:// URI scheme for channel-scoped asset references.
contribution: A timestamped, channel-scoped pointer from a design-source message to image asset p-14, preserving the provenance of an attached image.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment record named att-e45fc10b in the design-source channel pointing to image asset image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-14 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a design-source channel item had an image attachment located at recent-pitches/p-14.
